text: Implement basic WebGL node rendering prototype

status.comment: Implemented basic WebGL renderer with instanced circle rendering. Includes: shaders (node.vert/frag.glsl), core renderer (WebGLGraphRenderer.ts), Vue composable (useWebGLGraphRenderer.ts), and usage guide (WEBGL_PROTOTYPE_USAGE.md). Uses ANGLE_instanced_arrays for single draw call. Integrates with existing stores for camera/colors/selection. Ready for testing at 60fps with 5000+ nodes.
